monitor_the_situation.title: Israeli Attacks Kill Over 4,300 in Lebanon Since March 2
— S4 · Humanitarian · Beirut, Lebanon · 17h ago. Death toll from Israeli attacks on Lebanon since March 2 rises to 4,303, according to official reports.
IDF Kills Armed Terrorist in Southern Lebanon Buffer Zone
— S3 · Conflict · Southern Lebanon, Lebanon · 1h ago. The Israel Defense Forces killed an armed terrorist in the buffer zone of Southern Lebanon, amidst ongoing security operations near the border.
Dozens of Houthis Killed in Hodeidah Attack
— S3 · Conflict · Hodeidah, Yemen · 6h ago. Dozens of Houthi fighters were killed and wounded in Hodeidah as an attack was repelled, indicating ongoing clashes in the Yemeni port city.
